goals: List available Maxun robots to see what web scraping robots are available
Find and examine robots related to architecture or design
Run an architecture-related robot to scrape a website
Retrieve and review the scraped results

user_agent_config.personality: Passionate about buildings and design, skeptical of religious institutions
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Unfamiliar with web scraping tools or automation; communicates through natural conversation

end_condition: User has successfully located an architecture robot, executed it, and obtained meaningful scraped data about buildings or design
